tasks.name: Create activity feed types

action.target: TypeScript interfaces for Activity and ActivityFeedProps

tasks.purpose: Define type-safe contracts for activity data structure and component props

constraints: Must match user_activities table schema from Feature F2

tasks.input_state: user_activities table exists in database (created by F2)
tasks.output_state: Activity and ActivityFeedProps types defined inline in activity-feed-card.tsx
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Types compile without errors and match expected activity properties (id, user_id, activity_type, entity_type, entity_id, metadata, created_at)

tasks.name: Create activity feed loader
tasks.purpose: Fetch 10 most recent user activities from database with proper error handling

constraints: Must use 'server-only' directive
Wrap with React.cache for deduplication
Query user_activities table filtering by auth.uid()
Order by created_at DESC LIMIT 10
RLS enforces user can only see own activities

tasks.input_state: Activity types exist, user_activities table has RLS policies
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader fetches activities successfully and logs errors via logger service
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm --filter web test:unit -- activity-feed.loader

tasks.name: Create activity icon mapping utility

action.target: getActivityIcon function mapping activity types to Lucide icons

tasks.purpose: Centralize icon selection logic for different activity types

dependencies: Lucide React icons (FileText, Video, CheckCircle, etc.)
constraints: Return icon component based on activity_type and entity_type
Support types: lesson_completed, presentation_created, quiz_submitted, etc.
Default fallback icon for unknown types

tasks.input_state: Activity types defined, Lucide icons available
tasks.output_state: getActivityIcon utility function returns appropriate icon component
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function returns correct icon for each activity type with fallback for unknowns

tasks.name: Create entity link mapping utility

action.target: getEntityLink function generating URLs from entity type and ID

tasks.purpose: Generate proper navigation links for different entity types (lessons, presentations, etc.)

constraints: Support entity types: lesson, presentation, quiz
Generate absolute paths using pathsConfig
Return null for unsupported entity types

tasks.output_state: getEntityLink utility returns path string or null
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function generates correct URLs for all supported entity types

tasks.name: Create activity feed item component

action.target: ActivityFeedItem client component with icon, title, link, and relative time

tasks.purpose: Render individual activity with interactive hover effects and relative timestamp

constraints: Use 'use client' directive for hover effects
Display icon, activity title, relative time
Link to entity if getEntityLink returns path
Hover effect changes background color
Show tooltip with exact timestamp on hover

tasks.input_state: Icon and link utilities exist, Activity type defined
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders activity with clickable link and shows relative time (e.g., '2 hours ago')

tasks.name: Create activity feed card component

action.target: ActivityFeedCard async server component with populated state

tasks.purpose: Server component that loads activities and displays list in scrollable card

constraints: Async server component
Call loadActivityFeed() to fetch data
Wrap items in ScrollArea with 400px max height
Use Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent structure
Pass activities to ActivityFeedItem components

tasks.output_state: ActivityFeedCard displays list of activities in scrollable card
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Card renders with header 'Recent Activity' and scrollable list of ActivityFeedItem components
tasks.verification_command: pnpm dev && navigate to /home/(user) to verify card renders

tasks.name: Add empty state to activity feed card

action.target: Empty state UI when no activities exist

tasks.purpose: Provide helpful message and guidance when user has no activity history

dependencies: Lucide icons (Activity icon for empty state)
constraints: Check if activities array is empty
Display icon, heading, and description
Use i18n keys for text
Center content vertically and horizontally

tasks.output_state: Card shows empty state with icon and message when activities.length === 0
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty state renders with 'No recent activity' message when no activities exist
tasks.verification_command: Test with empty user_activities table and verify empty state shows

tasks.name: Create activity feed skeleton component
tasks.purpose: Show placeholder UI while activities are loading for better UX

constraints: Match ActivityFeedCard layout structure
Show 5 skeleton items (circles for icons, rectangles for text)
Use same Card, CardHeader, CardContent structure

tasks.acceptance_criterion: Skeleton renders with card header and 5 placeholder items matching feed layout
tasks.verification_command: pnpm dev and verify skeleton shows briefly before data loads

tasks.name: Add activity feed translations

action.target: i18n translation keys for activity feed text

tasks.purpose: Internationalize all user-facing text in activity feed

constraints: Add keys under 'activityFeed' namespace
Include: title, empty state heading/description, activity type labels
Follow existing translation key naming conventions

tasks.acceptance_criterion: Keys exist for 'activityFeed.title', 'activityFeed.emptyHeading', 'activityFeed.emptyDescription', and activity type labels
tasks.verification_command: pnpm lint:fix && verify JSON is valid

tasks.name: Wire activity feed card to dashboard page

action.target: ActivityFeedCard to user dashboard page with Suspense boundary

tasks.purpose: Integrate activity feed into user home dashboard with progressive rendering

constraints: Wrap ActivityFeedCard in Suspense with ActivityFeedSkeleton fallback
Place in PageBody component
Use grid layout for dashboard cards

tasks.input_state: ActivityFeedCard, skeleton, empty state, and translations exist
tasks.output_state: ActivityFeedCard renders on /home/(user) page with Suspense boundary
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard shows activity feed card with skeleton loader during fetch
tasks.verification_command: pnpm dev && navigate to /home/(user) and verify card renders

tasks.name: Add activity feed item component tests
tasks.purpose: Verify icon mapping, link generation, and relative time formatting work correctly

constraints: Test icon renders for different activity types
Test link generation for different entity types
Test relative time formatting
Test hover effects trigger
Test null entity link handling

tasks.input_state: ActivityFeedItem component is integrated and functional
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All tests pass covering icon mapping, links, relative time, and edge cases

tasks.name: Add activity feed loader tests

action.target: Unit tests for loadActivityFeed loader function

tasks.purpose: Verify loader fetches correct data, handles errors, and respects RLS

constraints: Mock Supabase client responses
Test successful data fetch
Test error handling and logging
Test limit of 10 activities
Test ordering by created_at DESC

tasks.input_state: Loader function is integrated and functional
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All tests pass covering successful fetch, errors, limits, and ordering
